X70 ECAS2

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference X70_ECAS2.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol KWP2000
Baudrate N/A
Send ID N/A
Receive ID N/A
Functional Addr 02
Functional Name Suspension pilotée
